'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 7''' was published in April [[1978]] by [[Paradise Press]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"The '[[Droid/Legends|Droids]] of [[Star Wars]]," by [[Humberto Kazinski|Dr. Humberto Kazinski]]: a look at the variety of droids seen in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|the original ''Star Wars'' film]], and speculation about their role in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
*"[[George Lucas]]—A Man and His Movies", by [[John May]]: a profile of the man behind ''Star Wars''.
*"Beams, [[Blaster/Legends|Blasters]], and Battlestations!", by [[Jon Trux]]: an article comparing the various energy weapons seen on film with the possibility of real space-based energy beams (either as weapons of war, as satellite-based power transmitters for cities, or as a means of spacecraft propulsion.)
